required_symptom_questions: What symptoms have you been experiencing, and when did they start?
Do you have chest pain or tightness? If so, does it come on with exertion or at rest?
Do you experience shortness of breath during physical activity or while lying flat?
Do you have palpitations, a racing heart, or irregular heartbeat?
Have you noticed any swelling in your legs, ankles, or feet?
Have you ever felt dizzy, light-headed, or lost consciousness?

required_documents.label: ECG / EKG report
required_documents.description: Most recent electrocardiogram from any previous evaluation

required_documents.label: Echocardiogram (2D Echo)
required_documents.description: Recent echocardiogram or stress echo report

required_documents.label: Lipid panel / cholesterol report
required_documents.description: Recent blood lipid and cholesterol levels

required_documents.label: Previous cardiac consultation or discharge summary
required_documents.description: Any prior cardiology evaluation, angiogram, or hospital discharge summary

required_symptom_questions: How have you been feeling since your last visit?
Have your symptoms improved, worsened, or stayed the same?
Are you taking all your prescribed medications regularly?
Have you had any new episodes of chest pain, breathlessness, or palpitations?
Have you made any changes to your diet or physical activity?

required_documents.label: Recent ECG (if done since last visit)
required_documents.description: Any ECG done after your last cardiac appointment

required_documents.label: Blood test results (lipids, HbA1c, kidney function)
required_documents.description: Recent blood investigations if ordered at last visit
